summary: Simulate AWS, GCP & DigitalOcean without paying the bill Discussion | Link
content: Simulate AWS, GCP, Azure, OCI & DigitalOcean architectures to predict cost, performance, and resilience without provisioning real resources or paying a cloud bill. Built for learners practicing cloud skills and AI agents training on cloud optimization.
chineseSummary: 无需付费即可模拟 AWS、GCP 和 DigitalOcean 讨论 |关联
chineseContent: 模拟 AWS、GCP、Azure、OCI 和 DigitalOcean 架构，以预测成本、性能和弹性，而无需配置实际资源或支付云账单。专为练习云技能和云优化人工智能代理培训的学习者而设计。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
